posts.author: mathump3 (Mathew Humphrey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Mat Humphrey

Mar 2, 2022, 11:18 AM GMT

Hi,
Please can we sort out some better email intergration please.
We use an exchange server but we dont have or feel the need to be directly hosted by MS365. please add some intergration for some other service or simply add the ablity to open a preformed email in the defult mail application. its the one bigest thing that is missing and its a big bug bare of ours having to manully email out

posts.author: abaldock (Alex Baldock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mat, have you ever had any feedback regarding this? We are quite keen to use monday.com but our email is hosted on site.

Really frustrating since Monday.com has competitors who can make this work.

posts.author: mathump3 (Mathew Humphrey)
posts.cookedHtml: nope no reply or feedback from Monday.com. still dosent seem to be a soloution for hosted Exchange. That coupled with a couple of other things like the number of intergrations and automations in the difernt packages we are considering moving to a one of the competitors that can actully offer us what we need. dont get me wrong Monday is grat and powerfull but still a little rough around the edges

posts.author: mathump3 (Mathew Humphrey)
posts.cookedHtml: Click up seems to have every think we need be it a little more expensive. we are running a ack office trial at the moment seems to be very simlar to Monday but has the missing features we need. Jira is anothr but not taken thast to trial yet.
